question.label: Thread follow
question.name: ross-team conversations move — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: Being remote makes it harder to read context that others seem to pick up naturally.

assessment.note: Remote work is making context harder to read in meetings, reinforcing a strong clarity gap around how decisions and commitments are picked up.

history.answer_excerpt: I am settling in, but I still feel like I am learning the unwritten rules in every meeting.
